case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. GERAIN JENKINS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GERAIN JENKINS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENKINS, GERAIN $2,688.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,805.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,688.00 FILED BY CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT JENKINS, GERAIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
